MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Martin M. Titcomb, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8. (Administrative fee) is scheduled today. There being no appearance court ordered plaintiff's counsel sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 10/31/2002 at 10:30 am. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long, CSR#8620 (212)
